AnalyticsMetricsResponse.description: Core analytics metrics with revenue, orders, engagement, and conversion data

averageOrderValue.description: Average order value (AOV) = total revenue / number of orders

conversionRate.description: Conversion rate as percentage (orders / unique visitors * 100)

gmv.description: GMV - Gross Merchandise Value (Tổng giá trị hàng hóa). Total product value (subtotal), does NOT include shipping/tax/fees, does NOT deduct shop discounts

itemsSold.description: Total number of items sold (sum of quantities)

netRevenue.description: Net Revenue - Shop Earnings (Doanh thu ròng). Actual amount shop receives = GMV - shopDiscount - platformFee

uniqueVisitors.description: Number of unique visitors (approximate from HyperLogLog)

firstMileServiceCode.description: Domestic first-mile service code for international shipping

internationalServiceCode.description: International shipping service code (e.g. 40004 for DHL_AIR)

serviceCode.description: Domestic shipping service code (e.g. 400021 for GHN Express)

addressId.description: Buyer's saved address ID (alternative to shippingAddress.addressId)

directItem.description: Direct item for Buy Now flow - mutually exclusive with shops. Use directItem.options for serviceCode/vouchers/loyalty.

paymentMethod.description: Preferred payment method for potential discounts

shippingAddress.description: Shipping address info for calculation (nested format)

options.description: Checkout options for Buy Now: serviceCode, vouchers, loyaltyPoints, etc.

variantId.description: Product variant ID to purchase directly

LowStockProduct.description: Low stock product alert with inventory levels and restock recommendations

averageDailySales.description: Average daily sales to estimate restock urgency

daysUntilOutOfStock.description: Estimated days until out of stock (based on average daily sales)

productName.example: Áo thun nam cotton cao cấp

threshold.description: Stock threshold that triggered this alert

directItem.description: Direct item for Buy Now flow (bypasses cart lookup)

loyaltyPoints.description: Total shop loyalty points to redeem across all shops

platformLoyaltyPoints.description: Platform loyalty points to redeem (cross-shop, platform-funded)

expectedUnitPrice.description: Expected unit price from checkout preview (for price validation)

promotionId.description: Promotion ID (CampaignProduct ID) from checkout preview (nullable)

quantity.description: Quantity confirmed for order (overrides cart quantity if present)

firstMileServiceCode.description: First-mile service code for international shipping (e.g. 10001 for GHN) - optional, defaults to GHN

globalVouchers.description: Global vouchers/coupons applied to this shop

internationalServiceCode.description: International shipping code - required if international

items.description: Items selected in this shop with expected prices for validation

loyaltyPoints.description: Loyalty points to redeem for this shop

serviceCode.description: Shipping service code for DOMESTIC orders (e.g. 53320 for GHN Standard, 400021 for GHN Express)

OrderStatusBreakdownResponse.description: Order status distribution with counts, rates, and breakdown by status

cancelledCount.description: Number of orders in CANCELLED status

completedCount.description: Number of orders in COMPLETED status

createdCount.description: Number of orders in CREATED status

paidCount.description: Number of orders in PAID status

pendingCount.description: Number of orders in PENDING status

returnedCount.description: Number of orders in RETURNED status

shippedCount.description: Number of orders in SHIPPED status

statusCounts.description: Raw status counts map for flexible frontend usage. Keys: CREATED, PENDING, PAID, SHIPPED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, RETURNED

totalOrders.description: Total number of orders in the period

PlatformDashboardResponse.description: Platform-wide dashboard for admin with real-time metrics, top performers, and hourly breakdowns

growthPercentages.description: Growth percentages vs yesterday. Keys: gmv, revenue, commission, orders, activeShops, uniqueBuyers

hourlyGmv.description: Hourly GMV breakdown for today (24 values from 00:00 to 23:00)

hourlyOrders.description: Hourly order count breakdown for today (24 values from 00:00 to 23:00)

topCategories.description: Top performing categories by revenue (default top 10)

topProducts.description: Top performing products by revenue (default top 10)

topShops.description: Top performing shops by revenue (default top 10)

activeShops.description: Number of shops with at least one order today

gmv.description: GMV - Gross Merchandise Value (Tổng giá trị hàng hóa)

loyaltyDiscountCost.description: Total discount cost borne by the platform from loyalty point redemptions

platformDiscountCost.description: Total discount cost borne by the platform from platform-funded promotions

platformNetRevenue.description: Net revenue of the platform after deducting discount costs and refund outflows

refundOutflow.description: Total value refunded/returned to buyers (cash outflow)

uniqueBuyers.description: Number of unique buyers (distinct user IDs)

voucherSalesRevenue.description: Revenue generated from voucher sales by platform

RevenueTimeSeriesResponse.description: Revenue time-series data with summary statistics and growth comparison

data.description: Time series data points (date + value pairs)

growthRate.description: Growth rate as percentage vs previous equivalent period (positive = growth, negative = decline)

maxRevenue.description: Maximum revenue in any single period

minRevenue.description: Minimum revenue in any single period

periodCount.description: Number of periods in the series

ReviewMetricsResponse.description: Review metrics with rating distribution, sentiment analysis, and period comparison

averageRating.description: Average rating across all reviews (1-5 stars)

negativeRate.description: Negative rate as percentage (1-2 stars / total * 100)

neutralRate.description: Neutral rate as percentage (3 stars / total * 100)

positiveRate.description: Positive rate as percentage (4-5 stars / total * 100)

ratingChange.description: Rating change vs previous period (positive = improved, negative = declined)

ratingDistribution.description: Rating distribution map for flexible frontend usage. Keys: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

reviewCountChange.description: Review count change vs previous period (positive = more reviews)

SearchSuggestionResponse.description: Response containing list of search suggestions

requestId.description: Unique request ID for tracking and debugging

addressChanged.description: True if address changed - triggers shipping fee recalculation

ShopDashboardResponse.description: Shop dashboard with real-time metrics, day-over-day comparison, and hourly breakdowns

growthPercentages.description: Growth percentages vs yesterday (positive or negative). Keys: gmv, netRevenue, orders, uniqueVisitors, productViews, cartAdds, conversionRate

hourlyOrders.description: Hourly order count breakdown for today (24 values from 00:00 to 23:00)

hourlyRevenue.description: Hourly revenue breakdown for today (24 values from 00:00 to 23:00, array of BigDecimal)

companyServiceId.description: Conkin companyServiceId (UUID) for selecting specific international service - takes priority over internationalServiceCode

firstMileServiceCode.description: Domestic first-mile service code for international shipping (e.g. 10001 for GHN) - optional for preview

globalVouchers.description: Global vouchers/coupons applied to this shop

internationalServiceCode.description: International shipping service code (e.g. 40004 for DHL_AIR) - optional for preview

loyaltyPoints.description: Loyalty points to redeem for this shop

platformLoyaltyPoints.description: Platform loyalty points to redeem for this shop (cross-shop)

serviceCode.description: Shipping service code (e.g. 400021 for GHN Express) - optional for preview

shippingFee.description: Shipping fee for this shop - optional for preview

SuggestionItem.description: Single suggestion item with metadata and navigation info

categoryId.description: Category ID if suggestion is category-specific

categorySlug.description: Category slug for SEO-friendly category URLs

keyword.description: Keyword text with Vietnamese diacritics (for display)

productId.description: Product ID if source is PRODUCT (for navigation)

productSlug.description: Product slug if available (for SEO-friendly URLs)

rankScore.description: Calculated relevance score (0.0-1.0), higher is more relevant

searchCount.description: Number of times this keyword has been searched

TimeSeriesDataPoint.description: Single data point in a time-series chart (date + value)

label.description: Optional formatted label for display (e.g., 'Feb 8' or 'Week 6')

value.description: Value at this date (revenue, orders, etc.)

orders.description: Number of orders in this category

revenueShare.description: Revenue share as percentage of total platform revenue

TopProductResponse.description: Top performing product with revenue, sales, and engagement metrics

orders.description: Number of orders containing this product

productName.example: iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB - Titan Tự Nhiên

quantitySold.description: Total quantity sold (sum of all units)

rank.description: Ranking position (1 = best seller, 2 = second best, etc.)

revenue.description: Total revenue generated by this product

shopName.example: Cửa hàng điện tử Phát Đạt

orders.description: Number of orders for this shop

shopName.example: Cửa hàng điện tử Phát Đạt

TrackSearchRequest.description: Request to track a search keyword

categoryId.description: Category ID if search was category-specific

applicableProducts.description: Applicable products map. Key is ProductID. Value is rule.
Applicable products map. Key is ProductID. Value is rule (all variants or specific variants).
Applicable products map. Key is ProductID. Value is rule.

GMV, shop payouts, platform fees, VAT liability grouped by DAY or MONTH. dateAnchor=SETTLED_AT (cash-basis: groups by when orders actually settled — no month-boundary gaps) or CREATED_DATE (accrual-basis: groups by order creation date, default).

MANDATORY: Must call this BEFORE /verify. Locks product for review, sets status to REVIEWING, and tracks start time (reviewLockedAt). Call when admin opens product detail page. Then use POST /{id}/verify to complete review with sections + decision. Review duration = verify timestamp - reviewLockedAt.

Review sections and apply final decision. REQUIRES active lock from POST /{id}/start-review (must be called first). Validates lock ownership and throws error if not locked or locked by another admin. Releases lock on APPROVED/REJECTED. Sections are nullable for partial review (stays REVIEWING until all approved).

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of users with optional filters and sorting.
- username: filter by username (optional)
- email: filter by email (optional)
- statuses: list of user statuses to filter (optional)
- roleNames: list of roles to filter (optional)
- sort: sort by default username (asc/desc) (optional)
- page: page number, default is 0 (optional)
- size: number of users per page, default is 10 (optional)
- isDeleted: include deleted users if true, default is false (optional)

post.description:
Create a new buyer account with the following details:
- username: unique username for login (required)
- email: valid email address, must be unique (required)
- password: password with at least 6 characters, include uppercase and lowercase letters, and numbers (required)

get.description: Check exists email to database
Check exists username to database
Get detail information of the currently authenticated user
Get buyer information of the currently authenticated user (if user has BUYER role)

patch.description: Change password for the currently authenticated user

get.description: Get shop information of the currently authenticated user (if user has SHOP role)

post.description:
Create a new shop account with the following details:
- username: unique username for login (required)
- email: valid email address, must be unique (required)
- password: password with at least 6 characters, include uppercase and lowercase letters, and numbers (required)

get.description: Statistics users to database
Return list of months and years where users logged in
get.summary: Available months and years for logins

get.description: Return list of months and years where users were created
get.summary: Available months and years for user creation

get.description: Statistics of user login and activity behavior including growth rate
Statistics of user creation by month/year including growth rate

Retrieve detailed information of a user by userId.
- userId: the unique identifier of the user (required)

put.description:
Update a user's account information with the following details:
- status: the new status of the user (optional). Possible values: ACTIVE, LOCKED, DELETED.
- role: the new role to assign to the user (optional). Examples: BUYER, SHOP, LOGISTICS, BUSINESS, ACCOUNTANT, EXECUTIVE.
- restore: boolean flag indicating whether to restore a previously deleted user (optional).

Update a user's account information with the following details:
- image: string

patch.description:
Lock a user account by userId with a reason.
- userId: the unique identifier of the user to lock (required)
- reason: the reason for locking the account, stored for audit (required)

Change the password of a user with the following details:
- userId: the ID of the user whose password is to be changed (path variable, required)
- currentPassword: the user's existing password (required)
- newPassword: the new password to set (required, must meet password rules)
- confirmPassword: confirmation of the new password (required, must match newPassword)

get.description:
Retrieve detailed permission information for a user by their ID.
This includes:
- Role-based permissions: permissions inherited from the user's role.
- User-specific permissions: permissions assigned directly to the user, overriding role permissions if conflicts exist.
Request parameters:
- userId: the unique identifier of the user (required)

put.description:
Assign or update specific permissions for a user, independent of their role.
- newPermissionIds: list of permission IDs to assign (required, cannot be empty)

patch.description:
Unlock a previously locked user account by userId.
- userId: the unique identifier of the user to unlock (required)
